name: Giant Rat
description: Swarm pest. Individually trivial, dangerous in numbers. Found wherever food rots.

sensory.sight: eyes like wet beads in the dark, too many of them, at knee height
sensory.sound: scratching, squeaking, the patter of small feet on stone
sensory.feel: something brushes your ankle and it isn't a draft

encounter_hooks: gnaw marks on stored food, too large for normal rats
a cellar that the innkeeper won't go into anymore
droppings the size of acorns along the walls
notes: Giant rats are the cockroaches of fantasy. They're everywhere. They're a nuisance quest for level 1 parties and a cellar hazard for everyone else.
